message:
fix(scan): handle non-stripping heredocs in Terraform extractor

The heredoc parsing was always trimming lines when checking for the
end marker. This is only correct for <<- (stripping) heredocs. For
plain << heredocs, the marker must appear at column 0 without leading
whitespace.

Changes:
- detect_heredoc_start now returns (marker, is_stripping) tuple
- Heredoc end marker matching only trims for stripping heredocs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
